{{Quote|We're ''scouts'' son, this sort of thing goes with the shoulder patch|Tanogo|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref>}}
'''Tanogo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Chief Petty Officer/Legends|Chief Petty Officer]]. He had served in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] prior to [[Ben Skywalker]]'s birth, and later in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] before joining the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] as part of the crew of the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']].

He was on the [[Rover (skiff)|''Rover'']], under the command of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentice [[Ben Skywalker]] when that ship was sent to [[Terephon]]. Their mission was to find out what had become of [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]] after the Jedi Knights' mission to Terephon. He was killed when the ''Rover'' was destroyed in the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
